choose.when:
INSERT INTO byai_tag_relation (relation_id, tag_id, obj_id, obj_type, create_time, creator_by, obj_code) VALUES
(#{item.relationId}, #{item.tagId}, #{item.objId}, #{item.objType}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.creatorBy}, #{item.objCode})

INSERT INTO byai_tag_relation (relation_id, tag_id, obj_id, obj_type, create_time, creator_by, obj_code) VALUES
(#{item.relationId}, #{item.tagId}, #{item.objId}, #{item.objType}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.creatorBy}, #{item.objCode})

INSERT ALL
INTO byai_tag_relation (relation_id, tag_id, obj_id, obj_type, create_time, creator_by, obj_code) VALUES (#{item.relationId}, #{item.tagId}, #{item.objId}, #{item.objType}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.creatorBy}, #{item.objCode})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
choose.otherwise:
INSERT INTO byai_tag_relation (relation_id, tag_id, obj_id, obj_type, create_time, creator_by, obj_code) VALUES
(#{item.relationId}, #{item.tagId}, #{item.objId}, #{item.objType}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.creatorBy}, #{item.objCode})
